title: Analysis-SpaceX debut draws a crowd, but few recent hot IPOs outpace the market

A Reuters analysis ‌of the 50 IPOs with the highest valuations in the past five years shows that investors would have been better off buying an S&P 500 ‌index fund about three-quarters of the time.
